title: Sith Rising
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|italics=1}}
{{ExpansionPack
|image=[[File:SithRising.jpg]]
|title=''Sith Rising''
|game=[[Star Wars Trading Card Game|''Star Wars'' Trading Card Game]]
|publisher=[[Wizards of the Coast]]
|release date=[[July 22]], [[2002]]<ref name="Release date">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=swtcg/article/faq|text=Star Wars TCG - FAQ}} announced [[July]] [[2002]] as the release date for ''Sith Rising'', while {{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=swtcg/article/errataenglishcards|text=''Star Wars: Sith Rising'' Errata and Rulings for English Cards}} was published on [[July 22]], 2002, indicating an approximate day of release. {{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=swtcg/article/playerstrategy1|text=Star Wars TCG - Player Strategy}} further confirms that ''Sith Rising'' was released approximately two weeks ahead of that year's [[Wikipedia:Gen Con|Gen Con]], which took place from [[August 8]]–[[August 11|11]], 2002 as per {{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=gencon|text=GenCon 2002}}.</ref>
|figures=

'''''Sith Rising''''' is the second expansion for the [[Star Wars Trading Card Game|''Star Wars'' Trading Card Game]] from [[Wizards of the Coast]]. It is based on the [[prequel trilogy]] film [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'']], while also introducing elements from the film [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']]. ''Sith Rising'' was released in [[July]] [[2002]].

''Sith Rising'' contains 90 cards, including 30 each of the rare, uncommon, and common variety. The expansion focuses on the [[Force power/Legends|powers]] of the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]] and introduces such new characters as [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] and [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]].



==Gameplay==
*New Abilities:
**'''Stun''' - reduces power of the unit your unit attacks until the end of turn
**'''Overload''' - unit can make additional damage, but it also damages itself

*Card Types:
**Battle: 14
**Character: 36
**Ground: 17
**Mission: 9
**Space: 14

==Development==
''Sith Rising'' was released in [[July]] [[2002]],<ref name="Star Wars TCG - FAQ">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=swtcg/article/faq|text=Star Wars TCG - FAQ}}</ref> in advance of that year's [[Wikipedia:Gen Con|Gen Con]] tabletop-game convention.<ref name="Star Wars TCG - Player Strategy">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=swtcg/article/playerstrategy1|text=Star Wars TCG - Player Strategy}}</ref> The expansion had originally planned to ship to distributors on [[July 31]], 2002.<ref name="Diamond Comics">{{WebCite|url=http://www.diamondcomics.com/update/500-599/528/update_528.htm|text=Previews Update: STAR WARS CCG: SITH RISING BOOSTER PACKS – Diamond Comic Distributors, Inc.|archivedate=20020812015211}}</ref>

Wizards of the Coast showcased ''Sith Rising'', along with demos of the ''Star Wars'' Trading Card Game, at [[Wikipedia:San Diego Comic-Con|San Diego Comic-Con]] in [[August]] 2002.<ref name="Press Release">{{WebCite|url=http://phx.corporate-ir.net/phoenix.zhtml?c=68329&p=irol-newsArticle_pf&ID=322031&highlight=|text=Hasbro Charges Into Comic-Con With Leading Boys Toys Brands & Exciting New Products; G.I. JOE, TRANSFORMERS, and STAR WARS Lead Star-Studded Lineup|archivedate=20190310200939}}</ref>
